primary_text: The SAT is changing — are you ready? Our expert instructors have already updated every lesson, practice test, and strategy guide for the new digital SAT. Students in our program see an average 150+ point improvement. Start with a free practice test to see where you stand.
headline: New SAT? We're Ready.
description: Updated courses for the digital SAT. Free practice test included.
notes: Timely hook (format change), specific claim (150+), free lead magnet

primary_text: Why do 96% of our students recommend us? Because we don't just teach the test — we teach students HOW to think through every question type. Our small-group classes (max 8 students) mean real attention, not a lecture hall. Join 2M+ students who chose Princeton Review.
headline: 96% Recommend Us
description: Small classes. Big results. Join 2M+ successful students.
notes: Social proof (96%, 2M+), differentiation (small groups), authority

primary_text: Your child's SAT score could determine which colleges say yes. Don't leave it to chance. Princeton Review's proven system combines expert teaching, adaptive practice, and score guarantees. If your score doesn't improve, you retake for free.
headline: Score Higher. Guaranteed.
description: Expert SAT prep with a score improvement guarantee.
notes: Stakes framing, guarantee as risk reversal, authority positioning

primary_text: SAT prep shouldn't feel like punishment. Our interactive online courses keep students engaged with game-like practice, real-time feedback, and instructors who actually make test prep fun. Because motivated students score higher.
headline: SAT Prep Students Love
description: Interactive online courses. Real-time feedback. Real results.
notes: Reframes prep as enjoyable, student-focused, engagement angle

primary_text: For 85+ years, Kaplan has helped millions of students achieve their testing goals. Our SAT prep combines decades of expertise with cutting-edge technology — adaptive learning that focuses on YOUR weak spots. Higher score or your money back.
headline: 85 Years of Test Prep
description: Adaptive SAT prep backed by 85+ years of expertise. Money-back guarantee.
notes: Heritage/authority (85 years), adaptive tech, money-back guarantee

primary_text: Not sure where to start with SAT prep? Take our free diagnostic quiz and get a personalized study plan in minutes. No commitment, no pressure — just a clear picture of where you stand and exactly what to work on next.
headline: Free SAT Diagnostic Quiz
description: Get your personalized study plan in minutes. No commitment required.
notes: Low-friction lead magnet, personalization promise, no-pressure tone

primary_text: Live online. Self-paced. Tutoring. However your child learns best, Kaplan has an SAT prep option that fits. All plans include 2,000+ practice questions, 8 full-length practice tests, and on-demand video lessons. Flexible scheduling. Real results.
headline: SAT Prep Your Way
description: Multiple learning formats. 2,000+ practice questions. Flexible scheduling.
notes: Flexibility angle, volume proof (2000+ questions), multiple formats

primary_text: The students who score highest on the SAT aren't necessarily the smartest — they're the most prepared. Kaplan's proven strategies teach you to work smarter, not harder. Master timing, eliminate wrong answers, and approach every question with confidence.
headline: Work Smarter on the SAT
description: Proven strategies for higher scores. Learn to master timing and test tactics.
notes: Strategy/intelligence reframe, tactical approach, confidence building

primary_text: Spring SAT is coming up fast. Our intensive 1-month bootcamp covers everything your child needs to know — from content review to test-day strategies. Limited spots available for our most popular program.
headline: SAT Bootcamp: 1 Month
description: Intensive SAT prep. Limited spots. Enroll before they fill up.
notes: Urgency (spring, limited spots), intensive format, scarcity

primary_text: World-class SAT prep. 100% free. Khan Academy is the official practice partner of the College Board. Get personalized practice recommendations, full-length practice tests, and video lessons — all at no cost. Because great test prep shouldn't depend on your family's budget.
headline: Free Official SAT Prep
description: Official College Board partner. Personalized practice. Always free.
notes: Free positioning, official partnership authority, equity message

primary_text: Students who complete 20+ hours of practice on Khan Academy see an average 115-point improvement on the SAT. That's real data from real students. Link your College Board account and get practice recommendations tailored to your PSAT results.
headline: 115-Point Average Gain
description: Personalized SAT practice based on your PSAT results. Free forever.
notes: Data-driven claim (115 pts), PSAT integration, personalization

primary_text: SAT prep that actually fits into your schedule. Practice for just 20 minutes a day on Khan Academy and watch your skills build over time. Our adaptive technology focuses on the exact areas where you need the most help. No classes. No commute. Just progress.
headline: 20 Minutes a Day
description: Adaptive SAT practice that fits your schedule. Free on Khan Academy.
notes: Minimal time commitment, convenience, adaptive technology

primary_text: SAT prep shouldn't cost a fortune. Chegg's SAT prep gives you expert-created practice tests, detailed answer explanations, and score prediction tools — all for less than the cost of a single tutoring session. Study smarter with Chegg.
headline: SAT Prep Under $15/mo
description: Practice tests, answer explanations, and score predictions. From $14.95/mo.
notes: Price disruption angle, value comparison, budget-conscious appeal

primary_text: Stuck on a practice problem? Chegg gives you step-by-step explanations for every answer — not just 'the answer is C.' Understand WHY so you can solve similar problems on test day. Plus, access expert Q&A for personalized help when you need it.
headline: SAT Help When You Need It
description: Step-by-step explanations. Expert Q&A. Understand the 'why' behind every answer.
notes: Understanding vs memorization, on-demand help, student empowerment

primary_text: Your SAT score is just one part of your college application — but it matters. Chegg helps you tackle the test with confidence through adaptive practice, video walkthroughs, and real-time progress tracking. See exactly where you stand before test day.
headline: Track Your SAT Progress
description: Adaptive practice and progress tracking. Know exactly where you stand.
notes: Progress visibility, data-driven confidence, realistic framing

primary_text: Every student learns differently. That's not a slogan — it's the reason we match your child with a tutor who adapts to their specific learning style, pace, and goals. 1-on-1 SAT prep that's built for YOUR student, not a classroom average.
headline: 1-on-1 SAT Tutoring
description: Matched to your child's learning style. First session free.
notes: Personalization depth, anti-classroom positioning, free trial

primary_text: SAT prep doesn't have to be stressful or expensive. Magoosh gives you 1,800+ practice questions, 200+ video lessons, and email support from expert tutors — all for a fraction of the cost of traditional prep. Study anywhere, anytime, on any device.
headline: Affordable SAT Prep
description: 1,800+ questions. 200+ videos. Study anywhere. From $79 total.
notes: Volume proof, price anchor, device flexibility, stress-free positioning

primary_text: We guarantee a 100+ point SAT score improvement — or your money back. No fine print. Magoosh students see real results because our adaptive platform identifies exactly what you need to study and skips what you already know.
headline: 100+ Point Guarantee
description: Score improvement guaranteed. Adaptive learning. Money back if we're wrong.
notes: Score guarantee with specifics, adaptive tech, risk reversal

primary_text: What if your child's SAT tutor also coached them on study habits, time management, and test-day mindset? Testive combines expert tutoring with personal coaching so students don't just learn the material — they learn how to perform under pressure.
headline: Tutoring + Coaching
description: SAT prep that goes beyond content. Build skills for test day and beyond.
notes: Holistic approach, coaching angle, performance mindset, differentiation

primary_text: Parents: you don't need to nag about SAT prep anymore. Testive's coaching team keeps your student accountable with weekly check-ins, progress reports, and personalized study plans. We handle the motivation so you can focus on being a parent.
headline: We Handle the Nagging
description: Weekly coaching + progress reports. You focus on being a parent.
notes: Parent pain point (nagging), accountability outsourcing, humor

primary_text: Small group SAT classes with a max of 6 students. Every student gets attention. Every question gets answered. Our expert instructors teach proven strategies while keeping the energy high and the pressure low. Because learning should feel good.
headline: Max 6 Students Per Class
description: Small group SAT prep. Expert instructors. Proven strategies.
notes: Small group specificity (max 6), positive learning environment, energy

primary_text: Colleges see hundreds of applications with similar GPAs and extracurriculars. A strong SAT score makes your child's application impossible to ignore. Princeton Review students improve by an average of 140 points. Make sure your child stands out where it matters.
headline: Stand Out to Colleges
description: Average 140-point improvement. Make your application impossible to ignore.
notes: Competitive admissions context, differentiation urgency, specific claim

primary_text: What's your SAT target score? Tell us your goal, and we'll build a study plan that gets you there. Kaplan's smart technology adapts to your progress in real time — spending more time where you need it and less time on what you've mastered.
headline: Set Your Target Score
description: Goal-based SAT prep. Smart technology adapts to your progress.
notes: Goal-setting hook, personalization, efficiency promise, tech angle

primary_text: Find your perfect SAT tutor in minutes. Browse profiles, read reviews, and choose a tutor who fits your schedule and budget. No subscriptions. No commitments. Pay only for the sessions you book. 1-on-1 SAT help from $30/hour.
headline: SAT Tutors from $30/hr
description: Browse tutors. Read reviews. No subscription required.
notes: Marketplace model, price transparency, no-commitment appeal, flexibility

primary_text: Your child deserves more than a pre-recorded video lesson. Wyzant connects students with real human tutors for live, 1-on-1 SAT prep. Ask questions. Get answers. Build understanding. Over 65,000 certified tutors ready to help.
headline: Real Tutors. Real Help.
description: 65,000+ certified tutors. Live 1-on-1 SAT prep. No subscriptions.
notes: Anti-recorded-content positioning, human connection, volume proof (65k)
